acceptance.proof: Every selected direction terminates under explicit discovery, connection, record-count, byte, string-length, and deadline bounds with sanitized framing and value evidence.
Initialization, length representation, UTF-8 value, marker, truncation, malformed length, cancellation, cleanup, hashes, failed attempts, and nonclaims are complete or explicitly unavailable.
Current policy, public boundary, documentation routing, and external workflow contracts pass without implementation or authority drift.

commit_policy: Commit proposal and lifecycle separately; publish only sanitized bounded observations, hashes, validators, instruction routes, and receipts. Preserve failed attempts and keep drivers, raw bytes, endpoints, diagnostics, caches, and machine paths private.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the bounded String observation and explicit non-implementation limits.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Run focused, public-boundary, and workflow gates.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route observation-only String evidence without implying implementation.
Bind exact sanitized observations and limitations.
Bind private driver, configuration, raw result, and official binary hashes without raw publication.
Route the focused observation validator through the sole policy.
Existing LSL ownership and public/private routing already apply.
Existing evidence, activation, and authority guidance already apply.

non_scope: Production implementation, public Rust API, feature activation, empty or multiple records, multiple channels, arbitrary or oversized strings, int64, numeric changes, non-loopback networking, discovery, clocks, queueing, recovery, or broad compatibility.
Official or rLSL source, copied or translated source, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, devices, private raw publication, commands derived from samples, or Manifold authority.
objective: Observe the smallest finite protocol-110 String sample framing envelope using independently authored private IPv4-loopback drivers and the pinned official endpoint only as a black-box oracle: exactly one channel and one caller record in each safely supported direction.
outputs: One sanitized bounded matrix for a nonempty ASCII/UTF-8 String value in exactly one channel and one caller record per safe direction.
Addressable observations for initialization, length/framing, timestamp, exact value, first failure stage, deadlines, cleanup, and private artifact hashes.
An evidence-backed decision whether a later variable-width String runtime unit is authorized or a narrower correction is required.
